detaileddescription.para: Defines the prefix for MLSpatialAnchorResult codes.
Maximum size for the name of the space in the MLSpatialAnchorLocalizationInfo structure.
The maximum number of anchors for the current space has been reached.
The minimum distance between anchors was not met.
The space has not been sufficiently mapped to allow this operation.
The provided anchor Id was not valid.
The provided expiration suggestion was not valid.
The operation cannot be completed because the device has not yet localized.
There was an error communicating with the server.
The operation failed because the underlying service is not yet available, retry later.
Ensure enum is represented as 32 bits.

briefdescription.para: SpatialAnchor-specific return codes.

detaileddescription.para: The device is not currently localized.
The device has localized successfully.
A localization attempt is currently in progress.
Ensure enum is represented as 32 bits.

briefdescription.para: The current localization status.

xrefdescription.para: Deprecated since 1.3.0. Scheduled for removal. Replaced by MLSpaceLocalizationStatus.

detaileddescription.para: Using on-device mapping.
Using cloud-based mapping.
Ensure enum is represented as 32 bits.

briefdescription.para: Mapping mode.

detaileddescription.para: Low quality, this anchor can be expected to move significantly.
Medium quality, this anchor may move slightly.
High quality, this anchor is stable and suitable for digital content attachment.
Ensure enum is represented as 32 bits.

briefdescription.para: The quality of the local space around the anchor.

detaileddescription.para: This can change over time as the user continues to scan the space.

briefdescription.para: SpatialAnchor-specific return codes.
The current localization status.

xrefdescription.para: Deprecated since 1.3.0. Scheduled for removal. Replaced by MLSpaceLocalizationStatus.

briefdescription.para: Mapping mode.
The quality of the local space around the anchor.

detaileddescription.para: This can change over time as the user continues to scan the space.

briefdescription.para: A structure representing a user-defined Spatial Anchor.
A structure used to populate anchor creation info when creating a new Spatial Anchor.
A collection of filters for Spatial Anchor queries.

detaileddescription.para: Filters that have been set will be combined via logical conjunction. E.g. results must match the ids filter AND fall within the radius constraint when both have been set.
This struct must be initialized by calling MLSpatialAnchorQueryFilterInit before use.

briefdescription.para: A structure containing information about the device's localization state.

xrefdescription.para: Deprecated since 1.3.0. Scheduled for removal. Replaced by MLSpaceLocalizationResult.

inbodydescription.para: The localization status at the time this structure was returned.
If localized, this will contain the name of the current space.
If localized, this will contain the unique ID of the current space.
If localized, this will contain the identifier of the transform of the target space's origin relative to the world origin.

briefdescription.para: Initialize default values for MLSpatialAnchorLocalizationInfo.

xrefdescription.para: Deprecated since 1.3.0. Scheduled for removal. Replaced by MLSpaceLocalizationResultInit.

briefdescription.para: Initialize default values for a MLSpatialAnchor structure.
Initialize default values for a MLSpatialAnchorCreateInfo structure.
Initializes the default values for a query filter.
Create a Spatial Anchor tracker.

parameterdescription.para: A pointer to an MLHandle which will contain a handle for a Spatial Anchor tracker if successful, otherwise it will be ML_INVALID_HANDLE.
The out_handle parameter was not valid.

briefdescription.para: Destroy a previously created Spatial Anchor tracker.

parameterdescription.para: A handle to a Spatial Anchor tracker created by MLSpatialAnchorCreate().
The handle parameter was not valid.

briefdescription.para: Create a new local Spatial Anchor at the desired location.

detaileddescription.para: On success, out_anchor will be returned with a newly generated ID.
Any unpublished anchor will be lost if the Headpose session is lost. See #MLHeadTrackingGetMapEvents for more details.

parameterdescription.para: Handle to a Spatial Anchor tracker.
A struct containing the creation info for the new anchor.
One of the parameters was null.

briefdescription.para: Publish an existing local Spatial Anchor to the persistent backend.

detaileddescription.para: Depending on the currently selected mapping mode, this can store the anchor locally or in the cloud. This call will fail if the device is not localized to a space.
Any unpublished anchor will be lost if the Headpose session is lost. See #MLHeadTrackingGetMapEvents for more details.

parameterdescription.para: Handle to a Spatial Anchor tracker.
The Id of the local anchor to publish.
One of the parameters was null.
The anchor was successfully published and persisted.
Invalid authentication credentials for this operation.

briefdescription.para: Delete an existing Spatial Anchor.

detaileddescription.para: If successful, this will delete the anchor from persistent storage based on the currently selected mapping mode.

parameterdescription.para: Handle to a Spatial Anchor tracker.
The Id of the anchor to delete.
One of the parameters was null.
Invalid authentication credentials for this operation.

briefdescription.para: Update a Spatial Anchor's properties.

detaileddescription.para: The only property that can currently be updated is the expiration timestamp.

parameterdescription.para: Handle to a Spatial Anchor tracker.
The anchor containing the desired updated properties.
One of the parameters was null.
Invalid authentication credentials for this operation.

briefdescription.para: Create a new query for Spatial Anchors in the current space.

detaileddescription.para: It is the responsibility of the caller to call MLSpatialAnchorQueryDestroy with the query handle returned from this function after the results are no longer needed.

parameterdescription.para: Handle to a Spatial Anchor tracker.
The filter structure for the query.
The handle for this query to be used with MLSpatialAnchorQueryGetResult.
The total number of entries found by the query. This can be any number between 0 and max_results.
One of the parameters was null.

briefdescription.para: Destroy a previously created query handle and release its associated resources.

parameterdescription.para: Handle to a Spatial Anchor tracker.
Handle to a Spatial Anchor query.
One of the parameters was null.

memberdef.argsstring: (MLHandle handle, MLHandle query_handle, uint32_t first_index, uint32_t last_index, MLSpatialAnchor *out_results)
memberdef.name: MLSpatialAnchorQueryGetResult

briefdescription.para: Get the result of a previous Spatial Anchor query.

detaileddescription.para: Putting index bounds on the results allows the caller to only receive a subset of the total number of results generated by the query. This is useful as a form of pagination in the case of a large number of anchors in the current space. Indexing is zero-based so if there are N results in the query, then it is required that 0 <= first_index <= last_index < N.

parameterdescription.para: Handle to a Spatial Anchor tracker.
Handle to a query obtained from MLSpatialAnchorQuery.
An array of (last_index - first_index + 1) size to hold the query results.
One of the parameters was incorrect.

briefdescription.para: Returns an ASCII string for MLSpatialAnchorResult and MLResult codes.

parameterdescription.para: The input MLResult enum from MLSpatialAnchor functions.

simplesect.para: ASCII string containing readable version of result code.

briefdescription.para: Get the current localization status of the device.

xrefdescription.para: Deprecated since 1.3.0. Scheduled for removal. Replaced by MLSpaceGetLocalizationResult.

parameterdescription.para: Handle to a Spatial Anchor tracker.
The localization info structure to be populated.
One of the parameters was incorrect.
